style_suffix: cinematic travel documentary, high contrast, authentic {city_name} landmarks, 4K vertical framing, realistic lighting, no watermark, no generic stock
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, watermark, blurry, low quality, wrong city

day.prompt_core: {city_name} daytime landmark {landmark_day_1}, cinematic drone and street documentary, natural daylight

transition.prompt_core: {city_name} golden hour transition, sun setting over ancient city walls, warm orange sky

night.prompt_core: {ancient_name} night street {landmark_night_1}, Tang dynasty lanterns, warm glow, festive crowd
